business_ideas.idea: Fresh pet food delivery (like Farmers Dog) - lagging 2-3 years behind human health trend
Toxin testing & transparency platform for consumer brands (Light Labs model)
Pet-specific water filtration and health product line
Integrated skincare company combining gut health + topical (probiotics + peptides + detox)
Home health assessment service (air/water/EMF/lighting/VOCs) - Lightwork model
Natural fiber athletic apparel (cotton-only shorts/shirts vs polyester)

predictions.text: Pet health trends follow 2-3 years behind human health trends
Cancer rates in dogs rising to 1 in 4 due to poor nutrition
Biomarker testing will spawn new category of biomarker-optimization trainers/apps
Skincare market mostly ineffective; only peptides, retinol, sunscreen work
Gut health improvements visible in skin within 6 months
Polyester underwear reduces male sperm count 60-70%; switching restores it
